description: CompositionPink and grey grey striped top made of 70% acrylic and 30% wool, has a ribbed V-neck, long raglan sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, and embroidered branding on the left hemFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsCrafted from acrowool fabric, this top from adidas is a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe.
